title: How to speed up AI agents by 80% on the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform
summary: A case study showing how to accelerate AI agents by 80% using parallel processing of SDK outputs and voice synthesis, OpenTelemetry instrumentation for latency diagnosis, and token consumption tracking. The workflow combines Antigravity IDE profiling, Cloud Trace analysis, and Cloud Run deployment.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video presents a case study on cutting AI agent latency by 80% on the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. The core technique is parallel processing of SDK outputs and voice synthesis, paired with OpenTelemetry instrumentation to diagnose where latency accumulates and token consumption tracking to monitor cost. The demonstrated workflow chains Antigravity IDE profiling, Cloud Trace analysis, and Cloud Run deployment, showing how profiling data drives concrete test-time optimizations.
